Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Grow_Your_Business.asp

# Growth and Operations Route to SBDC

## Reusable BOSS response pattern
For an existing business with revenue or operations, route to Grow Your Business, Business Advising, and Specialists. Focus on expansion, operations, capital access, marketing, workflows, HR, finance, and systems.

## Handoff fields to capture
- Stage
- Business idea/current business
- Location ZIP/county
- Primary decision
- What has been done
- Revenue/customer evidence
- Documents available
- Special eligibility or language preference
- Recommended resource and why
